facts.text: River Ridge sits within the Sebastian–Vero Beach Metropolitan Statistical Area, linking it to a larger regional economy.
Every resident in River Ridge lives in an urban setting—0% of the community is classified as rural.
River Ridge Community Development Districts use an alternative method for planning, acquiring, operating, and maintaining community-wide improvements.
CDD governance in River Ridge represents a major advancement in Florida’s effort to manage growth effectively and efficiently.
The district’s approach allows residents to set higher construction standards while securing a long-term solution for facility upkeep.
River Ridge’s cost‑of‑living index for December 2024 sits at 99.8, just below the national average of 100.
